## One-Stop Solution    for all your Steel  requirements

[**Long   Section**](http://micpune.com/products/#ms_angles)

[**Flat   Section**](http://micpune.com/products/#ms_flats)

[**Pipes  Tubes**](http://micpune.com/products/#ms_pipes)

[**TMT    Steel**](http://micpune.com/products/#tmt)

##### About    Manish Industrial Corporation

Manish Industrial Corporation was established in Pune in the year 1988 with an aim to provide the finest quality of steel products. We are one of the leading steel stockists of long and flat products and prime suppliers of diverse Mild Steel (MS) products such as Angles, Channels, Beams, Flats, Bars and Plates, Sheets, Pipes in a variety of sizes. We provide products of renowned brands as well as rerolled mills. We have well-equipped material handling systems, in-house transportation fleet and skilled workforce which ensures in-time quality supply for our valued customers. With an experience of over 3 decades, we have established ourselves as a

One-Stop Solution for all your steel requirements.

Presto Industries is a parent company of Manish Industrial Corporation since the last 55 years. It deals particularly into Thermo Mechanical Treatment Bars (TMT). We provide readily available stock of TMT 500 grade bars of rolling mills as well as different brands like TATA, SAIL, JINDAL. We also execute profile cutting of various sizes in MS Plates.

Few of our esteemed customers include Thermax Ltd., Kirloskar Pneumatic Ltd., Cummins India Ltd., Raheja Group, Forbes Marshall Ltd., Serum Institute of India Ltd., Century Enka Ltd., etc.

## USPs

     Readily available ex-stock material

      Reliable on-time service

      Wide range of products

      Committed quality material delivery

      Completely tested products with relevant Test Certificates

     A reputed, trusted and long-term client-base

      Experienced workforce

      Supply of cut-to-length HR Coils as per requirement

metadata.title: Manish Industries – One-Stop Solution for all your Steel requirements

data.summary: Manish Industrial Corporation, established in 1988 in Pune, specializes in providing a wide range of steel products, including Mild Steel (MS) items such as angles, channels, beams, and pipes. As a leader in stock supply, they promise reliable, on-time service and quality delivery supported by an experienced workforce and in-house transportation. The company also offers Thermo Mechanical Treatment (TMT) bars and profile cutting services. Notable clients include Thermax Ltd. and Serum Institute of India. Their key selling points include readily available stock, a diverse product range, and commitment to quality.
